---
title: "How the LLM actually reads a wiki"
description: "The LLM navigates by name-matched grep off the index, not by following links, so every edge-quality gain helps humans and extractors, not the LLM, until a retrieval step injects the graph."
date: "2026-07-20"
categories: [retrieval]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Empirical observation.** Grounded in real wikis, not projected.
:::

**Thesis.** The LLM navigates by name-matched grep off the index, not by following links, so every edge-quality gain helps humans and extractors, not the LLM, until a retrieval step injects the graph.

**Draws on.** Drawn from the wiki's LLM-Wiki-Read-Path and Graph-Comparison-Empirical.

## Outline

- 
- 
- 

_Stub. Expand from the seed page(s) above._
